text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp! It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Narita Brian and the other students all board
the bus...

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian! After achieving huge success in the
Classic Triple Crown tour, could you please share
a few words?

text_block_list.name: Newspaper Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I take it you're aware of the Triple Crown
Champion Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you'll able to surpass the formidable
bar set by the Emperor in terms of G1 wins?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People's enthusiasm for Narita Brian shows no
signs of cooling as she faces off in the Classic
Triple Crown. Rather, their expectations have
grown even more.
choice_data_list: You go ahead and get on the bus.
You go ahead and get on the bus.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text: Wait! Brian? Brian!
choice_data_list: Please direct any questions you have this way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha, it's quite a spectacle out there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You okay? How're things going as president?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I also tried to get out in front and deal with the
press head on at first.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove did not approve, however. She said
things would only get more heated.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. They did all keep mentioning your name
for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, well... there are those who would like to
compare the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Perhaps we actually should compare ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch! So that's your style, eh? Dangling bait in
front of me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I told you I'd accept your challenge back when
you dragged me into the student council, yet you
never compete with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're also in the Twinkle Series, yet you always
keep your distance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I've yet to see any real hunger in your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But when I finally line up next to you, there will
be no escape.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to drag you into a real contest one of
these days.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh. Well then, I'll bear that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside the bus, the curtains are closed to block
out the sun, which is blazing hotter than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is on that cool, shaded bus that the two racers
pledge to face each other.
